name: Stay In Your Lane Schoolie Bus
owner_or_parent: Stay In Your Lane Schoolie Bus Project (501c3 nonprofit)
recent_news: Registered 501(c)(3) nonprofit (EIN 84-2834221) based in Raytown/Kansas City, MO; appears to be a community/charity project, not a contracted school-bus operator.
fit_notes: Not a tuck-in target. This is a small nonprofit 'Schoolie' project (converted skoolie/community vehicle) rather than a contracted student-transportation operator. Skip.

name: Haines Busing
districts_or_customers: Local Jefferson County, PA area districts (likely Brookville Area / Clarion area)
recent_news: No M&A or material news found. Small owner-operated rural school-bus contractor in Corsica (Jefferson County), PA; appears in business directories only (Yellow Pages, Manta, D&B) with no website.
fit_notes: Very small (~7 employees, ~$294K revenue) family-owned rural PA contractor — too small to be a stand-alone tuck-in, but could be a route-acquisition fold-in if Summit/Durham has nearby western-PA operations. Approach owner Kevin Haines directly.

name: K I K School Bus Trnsprtn
recent_news: No corroborating web presence found. 954 area code suggests Broward County, FL. No website, no district contracts, no news, no owner name disclosed in available sources.
fit_notes: Essentially invisible micro-operator (~3 employees). Cannot confirm it is actually an operating school-bus contractor. Low-priority tuck-in; would require phone outreach to qualify before any further work.

name: Dum's Bus Svc
districts_or_customers: West Perry School District area (Perry County, PA)
recent_news: Owner-operated school-bus carrier (USDOT 356749) since 1989, headquartered in Elliottsburg, PA. SAFER/FMCSA shows ~32 power units and ~50 drivers; intrastate non-hazmat school-bus carrier. No M&A or strategic-owner ties found.
fit_notes: Attractive small tuck-in for Summit's PA platform: ~30+ bus fleet, 35+ years under sole owner Dennis K. Dum (likely retirement-age succession), stable West Perry County district base. Note: revenue tag of $271K in source data dramatically understates a 32-bus operation — true revenue likely $2-4M+. Worth direct outreach.

name: Ridgecrest Medical Trnsprtn
districts_or_customers: Medi-Cal, HealthNet and other CA insurance payors
recent_news: NEMT-only operator in Ridgecrest, CA (Kern County). Services per company website are exclusively non-emergency medical transport (doctor appts, pharmacy, methadone clinics, blood transfusions); no school-bus or SPED contracts disclosed. Operating since ~2014/2015.
fit_notes: Not a fit for Summit's school-bus / SPED tuck-in thesis — this is a pure NEMT (adult medical transport) shop, not a student-transportation contractor. Skip.
